title: Notifications and Sound
drDigitalIntro:
You control which apps interrupt you.
• Turn off notifications from distracting apps.
• Adjust volume in Sound settings.
• Turn on Do Not Disturb when you want quiet time.

playgroundTask.instructions: You need to focus for an hour. Turn on Do Not Disturb in Notifications settings.

drDigitalSuccess: Do Not Disturb silences all popups and sounds until you turn it off — perfect for focused work.
drDigitalHint: Open Notifications in Settings and look for the Do Not Disturb toggle at the top.
